zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Wilson於1590年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Alexander Wilsone16歲，母親Mrs. Alexander Wilsone17歲。她於1611年5月9日與Daniel Ross在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1650年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Wilson于1590年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Alexander Wilsone16岁，母亲Mrs. Alexander Wilsone17岁。她于1611年5月9日与Daniel Ross在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1650年在她的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Wilson was born in 1590, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Wilsone, was 16 and her mother, Mrs. Alexander Wilsone, was 17. She married Daniel Ross on 9 May 1611, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1650, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Wilson est née en 1590, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Wilsone, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alexander Wilsone, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Daniel Ross le 9 mai 1611, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1650, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Wilson 1590 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Wilsone 16 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Alexander Wilsone 17. Sie hat am 9. Mai 1611 in Edinburgh, Scotland Daniel Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1650 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Wilson è nata il nel 1590 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Wilsone, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Alexander Wilsone, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Daniel Ross il 9 maggio 1611, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1650, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Wilsonが1590年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Alexander Wilsoneは16歳，母Mrs. Alexander Wilsoneは17歳であった。1611年5月9日にスコットランドエディンブルグでDaniel Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1650年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Wilson(이)가 1590년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Wilsone(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Alexander Wilsone(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1611년 5월 9일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 Daniel Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1650년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Wilson nasceu em 1590, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Wilsone, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alexander Wilsone, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Daniel Ross em 9 de maio de 1611, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1650, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Wilson родилась в 1590 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Wilsone было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alexander Wilsone, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel Ross 9 мая 1611 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1650 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Wilson nació en 1590, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Wilsone, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alexander Wilsone, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Daniel Ross el 9 de mayo de 1611, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1650, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
